sections.paragraph:
ἀϑετέω [ἀ-priv., τίϑημι] lit. ‘set aside’ as unworthy of consideration

—a. in legal sense, of things invalidate, nullify Mk 7:9; Gal 2:21; 3:15; 1 Cor 1:19.

—b. ignore, disregard of persons Lk 10:16; Jd 8; in sense of going back on a promise refuse, break faith with Mk 6:26; of things Lk 7:30.
